title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 294.024 - Employment of children, work certificate required
text:
294.024.  Employment of children, work certificate required. — A child may not be employed during the regular school term unless the child has been issued a work certificate or a work permit pursuant to the provisions of this chapter.
(L. 1957 p. 525 § 3, A.L. 1989 H.B. 461, A.L. 1995 H.B. 300 & 95 merged with H.B. 414, A.L. 2002 S.B. 923, et al.)
